steps.title: Recognize the assertion's two requirements
steps.content: The assertion claims provisioning services are reported in every region and represent the overall majority of reported services.

steps.title: Identify which choice proves both claims
steps.content:
Choice B establishes both claims: “none of the percentages shown for provisioning services are lower than 33%” proves provisioning across all regions (with Central at the minimum), while the overall 75% proves it's the majority.
Choices A and D highlight only regional variation; choice C confirms regional presence without the majority evidence.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
